name: onecli
description: Connect Codex to external APIs through the OneCLI gateway without local service credential management.

interface.shortDescription: Use OneCLI credentials from Codex API calls.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex skills and a session-start hook for routing external API requests through the OneCLI HTTPS gateway. OneCLI injects stored credentials at the proxy boundary so Codex does not need service-specific API keys in the local environment.
defaultPrompt: Set up OneCLI Gateway in Codex.
Plan a multi-service API workflow through OneCLI.
